title: Golden Globes 2026: Supporting Actor Winners
text: Variety reports on the Golden Globes 2026 supporting actor winners. In the film supporting actor category, Stellan Skarsgård claimed the award for best supporting actor in any motion picture for his role in Sentimental Value. The veteran actor portrayed an emotionally remote filmmaker in the Norwegian drama. In television supporting actor, Owen Cooper made history at the 83rd Golden Globe Awards, becoming the youngest ever winner in the category of best supporting actor in a TV drama. The 16-year-old earned recognition for his performance in Netflix's Adolescence, a murder investigation series shot in one continuous take. Cooper's win marked a notable milestone, as the ceremony historically sees adult performers dominate the supporting acting categories across television and film. The supporting actor categories reflected both established talent and new voices, with international cinema receiving significant recognition through Skarsgård's win for the Norwegian production Sentimental Value.
